SHUNMOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE.title: Relic Exchange
SHUNMOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE.pages.INITIAL.des:
You enter a smoke-filled hut.
Behind the counter, a mysterious merchant smiles at you:
"Welcome! How about trading your relics for something nice?"
SHUNMOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE.pages.INITIAL.opt: Lose [red]1[/red] random relic. Gain a random Power card.
Lose [red]2[/red] random relics. Gain a random Power card with [blue]Imbued[/blue] enchantment.
Gain a random card from this mod.
SHUNMOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE.pages.OPT1_DONE.d:
The merchant takes your relic and hands you a gleaming Power card.
"A bargain!"
SHUNMOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE.pages.OPT2_DONE.d:
The merchant carefully pockets two relics, producing a card with magical runes.
"Infused and ready to go!"
SHUNMOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE.pages.OPT3_DONE.d:
The merchant rummages through a drawer and hands you a special card.
"Exclusive stock, you won't find this anywhere else~"
SHUNMOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE.pages.NO_RELICS.d: The merchant shakes his head: "You don't have enough relics to trade."
SHUNMOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE.pages.NO_CARD.des: The merchant checks the shelves: "Sorry, we're out of Power cards today."
SHUNMOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE.pages.NO_MOD_CARD: The merchant searches around: "Strange, the exclusive stock seems to have vanished..."
